name: Frontend — SSR / Hybrid

name: Frontend — Resumability

name: Protocol — gRPC
label: Protocol — gRPC

name: Protocol — GraphQL
label: Protocol — GraphQL

name: Protocol — WebSocket
label: Protocol — WebSocket
